name: XTL-6865
description: XTL-6865 is a combination of two fully human monoclonal antibodies (Ab68 and Ab65) against the hepatitis C virus E2 envelope protein. It is being developed to prevent HCV re-infection following a liver transplant and for the treatment of chronic HCV disease.
indication: Investigated for use/treatment in hepatitis (viral, C).
mechanismOfAction: XTL-6865 is a dual-antibody (Ab68 and Ab65) therapy directed against the highly mutagenic hepatitis C E2 envelope protein and intended therefore to inhibit viral entry into host cells.
